review_comment:
I wish this idiom of adding const to local variables wasn't being used.  It's not common in Zephyr, and creates difficulties when using Coccinelle to do massive changes involving `const` like #24873 

However there's enough of this already in-tree it's not worth changing IMO.  We might have to deal with it globally some day.

I do not know, I kinda like it. It just tells me that I am just using this constant as an shortcut/alias only.
It helped me to find bug once when I have used `=` instead of `==`  in conditional expression, in the old times.
